name: Web to Markdown
description: Fetch a public webpage or crawl a bounded same-origin website into clean, metadata-rich Markdown and JSONL documents for retrieval and RAG workflows.

tools.name: fetch_page
tools.description: Fetch one public HTML page, strip scripts/navigation noise, preserve headings, lists, links, code, and metadata, then return or save RAG-friendly Markdown.

url.description: Public http:// or https:// webpage URL.

output_path.description: Optional Markdown output file. Omit to return Markdown only.

max_bytes.description: Maximum HTML response size. Default 5,000,000 bytes.

allow_private.description: Allow localhost/private-network targets. Default false; enable only for trusted local sites.

include_markdown.description: Include full Markdown in JSON stdout. Set false when saving large pages to disk.

tools.name: crawl_site
tools.description: Breadth-first crawl a bounded, same-origin website. Respects robots.txt by default and writes one Markdown file per page, corpus.json metadata, and documents.jsonl ready for ingestion.

url.description: Public starting URL. Crawl remains on the same scheme and host.

max_depth.description: Maximum link depth from the starting page, 0-10. Default 2.

delay.description: Polite delay between requests in seconds. Default 0.35.

max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes accepted per page. Default 5,000,000.

include.description: Optional regular expression URLs must match.

exclude.description: Optional regular expression for URLs to skip, such as /login|/cart.

tools.name: inspect_corpus
tools.description: Read a generated corpus.json and return a compact page inventory, errors, paths, word counts, hashes, and source metadata without loading every Markdown document.

corpus_path.description: Path to corpus.json or its containing crawl directory.

limit.description: Maximum page and error records to return. Default 20.
